title: Day 32 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - びじゅつかんの　なかでは　おおきい　こえで　はなさないで　ください。= Please, do not speak with a loud voice inside the museum.

Sentence 2 - まだ　いかないで　ください。= Please don't go yet.

Sentence 3 - まちがえないで　ください。= Please, don't mistake it.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
